summary: A single static, handheld phone shot (credited to staffer @MargoMartin47) of President Trump and his delegation walking down a long red carpet on the tarmac in Beijing at dusk, flanked by two lines of Chinese students in matching outfits waving small US and Chinese flags, with Air Force One ('UNITED STATES OF AMERICA') parked behind. It is a single-take recording with ambient sound, no cuts, and no music track.
notable_text: On-aircraft livery: 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA'. Tweet text: 'Chinese students greet President Trump with a flag-waving ceremony upon his arrival in Beijing.'
